message:
fix(layout): fix 4 bugs in Brandes-Köpf coordinate assignment

1. CRITICAL: Fix double shift application — class shifts were applied
   to block roots then re-applied during propagation, producing
   incorrect coordinates. Now shifts are applied to roots first, then
   propagated once to all block members.

2. IMPORTANT: Fix lazy predecessor placement — predecessor block roots
   that hadn't been placed yet were set to 0.0 instead of being
   properly placed first. Now uses recursive place_block (bounded by
   block root count) matching the original BK algorithm.

3. Remove duplicate functions from concurrent agent — another agent
   added bk_vertical_alignment_optimized with a bug (align[v]=root[v]
   creates circular chains causing infinite loops in compaction).
   Merged their adjacency pre-computation optimization into the
   correct implementation.

4. Fix crossing_refinement call site mismatch from concurrent changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
